metadata.description: A high-efficiency, semi-automated prompt engineering workspace for internal delivery teams.
metadata.persona: The Performance Pro (Archetype 2) - Tactical, Precise, High-Density.

rules: Use 'Inter' for UI labels, body text, and inputs.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL raw prompt text, variables, and code snippets.
CRITICAL: Headings must use tight tracking (tracking-tight).
CRITICAL: Uppercase labels must be tracked wide (tracking-wider) and tiny (text-[10px] or text-xs).

primary.description: Deep Indigo - Used for primary actions, active states, and focus rings.

secondary.description: Slate 100 - Used for secondary buttons, muted backgrounds.

accent.description: Indigo 50 - Used for active selection backgrounds, subtle highlights.

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
variants.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95

Button.usage: Use 'default' for primary actions (Save, Compile). Use 'outline' for secondary (Cancel, Export). Use 'ghost' for icon-only buttons.

Card.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden
Card.usage: Used for 'Prompt Sections' (e.g., Persona, Language). Each section is a card.

Input.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all

Badge.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

Switch.style: peer inline-flex h-6 w-11 shrink-0 cursor-pointer items-center rounded-full border-2 border-transparent transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=checked]:bg-primary data-[state=unchecked]:bg-slate-200
Switch.usage: Used to toggle Prompt Sections on/off.

SplitPaneWorkspace.description: The core workspace layout. Left side for editing, Right side for preview.
SplitPaneWorkspace.structure: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-0 h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden
SplitPaneWorkspace.left_pane: lg:col-span-7 xl:col-span-6 overflow-y-auto p-6 md:p-8 border-r border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/50
SplitPaneWorkspace.right_pane: lg:col-span-5 xl:col-span-6 bg-white overflow-y-auto p-8 lg:p-12 shadow-inner relative

SectionCardStack.description: Vertical stack of cards in the Builder pane.

micro_interactions: Hovering over a variable input highlights the corresponding text in the Preview pane.
Toggling a section switch animates the card height (accordion style).
Buttons have a subtle active scale (scale-95) for tactile feel.

textures.noise: Add a subtle noise texture to the sidebar or empty states to reduce 'digital flatness'.
textures.gradients: Use extremely subtle gradients (slate-50 to white) on cards. No harsh gradients.

motion.recommendation: Use <AnimatePresence> for adding/removing sections. Use layoutId for smooth reordering if implemented.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1). Use slate-600+ for text on white.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.
accessibility.keyboard: Ensure all form inputs and toggles are keyboard navigable (Tab index).
accessibility.screen_readers: Use aria-expanded on accordions and aria-label on icon-only buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'framer-motion' if not present. Use 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' for class handling.
2. File Structure: Create a 'components/prompt-builder' directory for specific components.
3. State Management: Use a robust local state (useReducer or Context) to handle the complex object of { sections, active_sections, variables }.
4. Preview Logic: Create a 'compilePrompt' utility function that takes the state and returns a formatted string.
5. Raw Editor: When 'Edit Raw' is toggled, showing the template text with placeholders. Changes here should update the template for this instance.
6. Variable Parsing: Implement a regex utility to detect {variable_name} in text and auto-generate inputs.
7. DO NOT use standard browser alerts. Use 'sonner' for all notifications.
8. THEME: Default to Light mode. Dark mode is optional but supported via Tailwind 'dark:' classes.
9. CRITICAL: Avoid 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Manrope' (Google Fonts) or 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
10. Empty States: Make them beautiful. Use a dashed border container with a muted icon and clear CTA.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
